property.name: Four Haus Residence
property.amenitiesLevel: There is no amenties in this building

steps.title: Step 1 – Collect the keys from the lockbox
steps.text:
Lockbox Location
  • Proceed to 32-34 Bunn Street, Pyrmont NSW 2009. The lockbox is located on Harwood Lane, across the street from the property.
  • Please open the lockbox labelled '4H' with the passcode provided in the message.
  • You should be able to see 2 key cards in the lockbox.
  • Please close the lockbox and jumble up the code.

steps.title: Step 2 – Proceed to cross the road and walk towards building B.
steps.text:
After collecting the keys, cross the road and walk towards building B.
Look for Building B, Unit 24-47.
Your apartment is UNIT 45 , LEVEL 7

steps.title: Step 1 – Collect the keys from the lockbox
steps.text:
Lockbox Location
  • Proceed to 32-34 Bunn Street, Pyrmont NSW 2009. The lockbox is located on Harwood Lane, across the street from the property.
  • Please open the lockbox labelled '4H' with the passcode provided in the message.
  • You should be able to see 2 key cards in the lockbox.
  • Please close the lockbox and jumble up the code.

steps.title: Step 2 – Parking entrance is located near the middle of Harwood Lane
steps.text: Please hold your key card on the reader until the light turn green and wait for the garage gate to open fully.

steps.title: Step 3 – Enter the parking and park at spot 45 on level P1
steps.text:
• Drive down the ramp. Parking is located on Level P1, the first level upon entry.
  • Turn left when reaching the intersection.
  • You should be able to see parking spot 45 on your right-hand side.

steps.title:
Step 4 – Take the lift to the left of the parking.
DO NOT take the lift in front of your parking spot
steps.text:
• Walk past the rubbish bins and head to the lift labeled Building B (Units 24–47)
  • You are located on Level 7, Unit 45
  • Hold the access card on the reader for 1 second until you hear a beep, then press Level 7.
  • Once you exit the lift, the unit is on your right.

houseRules: Please keep the access cards and remote safe and respect building rules.
Please keep the volume down after 10:00 PM.
A fee of $200 will be charged for the replacement of each access card and remote.
